title: ‘There was no need for Govt. intervention’: Wangchuk’s wife Gitanjali on Delhi HC refusing interim relief on hospital transfer
summary: Gitanjali Angmo said the PIL was “wrongly interpreted” and that they will file another petition on July 20

title: Senior AAP leader Manish Sisodia to join march to Parliament on Monday
summary: Party alleges that activist Sonam Wangchuk was detained by the Centre to prevent him from taking part in the march.

title: Thousands gather at Jantar Mantar ahead of CJP’s march to Parliament
summary: The Cockroach Janta Party’s designated protest site overflowed with unprecedented crowds following activist Sonam Wangchuk’s forced hospitalisation

title: Security up in Delhi ahead of Parliament session, CJP rally
summary: Prohibitory orders in place till August 22; police say CJP has not sought permission for march

title: Morning Digest: Spain wins World Cup with Ferran Torres’ goal; thousands gather at Jantar Mantar ahead of CJP’s march to Parliament
summary: Here is a select list of stories to start the day.

title: FIFA World Cup Final: Spain beats Argentina 1-0 to win second title
summary: Ferran Torres’ deserved winner came ‌16 years after Andres Iniesta ​also scored in extra time to lift the Spaniards ⁠to their first World Cup

title: Spain vs Argentina, FIFA World Cup final Highlights: Spain wins World Cup with Ferran Torres' goal
summary: Spain dominated and Argentina was tepid for most of the game; Torres scored in extra time for La Roja to win its second World Cup

title: Self-help groups to make two lakh national flags ahead of I-Day
summary: It will be organised by the State Urban Livelihood Mission (SULM) of the Delhi Government

title: Maharashtra panel to study ST benefits after Christian conversion allegations
summary: The notice stated that Christian religious leaders, missionaries, and their institutions in Navapur taluka were using inducements to compel tribals and non-tribals to convert

title: Government issues a show-cause notice to Janakpuri private school, proposes takeover
summary: “When the police visited the pre-primary branch to investigate the crime, all 64 CCTV cameras installed on the premises were found to be completely non-functional. The school had intentionally operated without a maintenance contract,” says statement

title: Srinagar’s Vichar Nag temple sees puja again, L-G says ‘revival serves as a historic bridge’
summary: Scores of Kashmiri Pandits attended the ceremony in an area that once hosted a number of Pandit families who had to leave their homeland due to militancy in the 1990s

title: Maharashtra govt allows hotels, restaurants, bars to remain open till 4 a.m. for FIFA World Cup final
summary: The Home Department issued the directive onJuly 18) following a request from the National Restaurant Association of India (NRAI), Mumbai, which sought extension of operating hours for hospitality establishments on the night of the final

title: West Asia war LIVE: Iranian missile hits Jordan's Aqaba Airport, reports Iran state media
summary: The Israeli military said it had identified and intercepted missiles launched from Iran towards Aqaba in Jordan

title: CJP's night vigil begins, crowds camp at Jantar Mantar on eve of Parliament march call
summary: Crowds continued to pour into the CJP's protest site at Jantar Mantar through the day as preparations gathered pace for Monday's march to Parliament

title: U.K.'s Burnham drops digital ID scheme to prioritise cost of living, say allies
summary: Dubbed the ‘King of the North’ for his work as the mayor of Greater Manchester in northwestern England, Burnham will replace Keir Starmer ‌as Prime Minister on July 20, when he says he will also unveil his cabinet team of top Ministers

title: Garry Sobers: cricket’s greatest — a legacy beyond numbers
summary: The unchecked outpouring of grief at his passing, followed almost immediately by tales of his kindness and generosity, are testament to the standing he enjoys in the cricketing ecosystem in which he is the unquestioned emperor

title: Soccer-Hydration breaks did not impact World Cup results but future undecided, says FIFA's Wenger
summary: "It did not look to me that it [hydration ⁠break] changed the results of the competition. But we are here to serve people who watch football," he said

title: Government to move Bill in Rajya Sabha today to make insult to Vande Mataram a criminal offence
summary: 1971 legislation to be amended; Lok Sabha to take up Bill to increase number of Supreme Court judges

title: Geo-tagging of State’s forest locations opens the doors for trespassers
summary: Forest department flags 23 Google Maps listings inside reserve forests in Kozhikode as misleading; officials say unauthorised map pins and uploaded photographs are encouraging illegal entry into protected areas; DFO seeks removal of the listings, warning of trespassing, public safety risks and human-wildlife conflict

title: Bihar CM opens ₹130.88-cr. link to divert floodwaters, enhance farm productivity
summary: The link, part of a river interlinking project, will reduce intensity of floods in northern Bihar, says Choudhary; he also inaugurates 551 schools, lists measures to improve education infrastructure

title: At least eight dead, 15 hurt in Nagaland landslide
summary: Heavy incessant rainfall and a cloudburst caused widespread destruction at various locations in and around Mon town; State announces ex-gratia of ₹4 lakh for kin of deceased, ₹74000 for each of the injured

title: Lord’s ODI: Rohit’s classy hundred not enough as England clinches series in a run-fest
summary: The under-fire opener smashes 138 but Curran strangles the Indian batters by taking the pace off in a mammoth chase; Duckett, Bethell, Root and Buttler make merry as the  home side notches up the highest ever List-A total at the iconic venue

title: Petrol attack at Vembayam bar leaves four with burn injuries
summary: The injured have been admitted to the Government Medical College Hospital here

summary: The Delhi Police say ‘no permission sought or granted’ for July 20 Parliament protest march and Section 163 is currently in effect in the New Delhi district

title: Students must unite against drugs: Minister Bindu Krishna
summary: She was presiding over the distribution ceremony of the ‘Focus Kollam’ Minister’s Excellence Award-2026, organised for talented students from the Kollam constituency

title: Quiz organised for students
summary: A written round was followed by a final round with the top six teams

title: The stark reality of the missing jobs for India’s Gen Z
summary: Celebrating India’s demographic dividend means little when Gen Z faces unemployment, insecurity and shrinking pathways to decent work

title: Josh Kerr of Britain breaks the men''s mile world record that stood since 1999
summary: At a Diamond League meet in London, Kerr broke Moroccan great Hicham El Guerrouj's mark of 3 minutes, 43.13 seconds, set in Rome in 1999. The 28-year-old native of Edinburgh celebrated with a lap of honour at London Stadium

summary: The quarry might pollute groundwater and waterbodies, and affect agricultural activities, say residents

summary: Facing USA's Dymond Precious Guilford in a gripping gold medal clash, the young Indian wrestler exhibited immense tactical composure under pressure

title: Loco pilots want action dropped against motorman
summary: They say he averted a potential disaster caused by signal failure and cannot be held “blameworthy”

title: CMRL ropes in consultant to procure trains, upgrade stations in phase 1 network
summary: It plans to buy 28 six-coach trains as commuters demand improved frequency during peak hours. AECOM India and Nippon Koei joint venture likely to be project management consultant: officials

title: Panel to consider two complaints on leasing and illegal diversion of forest land in Kerala
summary: The complaints on reported illegal diversion of forest land and irregular timber auction in Chalakudy forest division and the alleged continued use of reserved forest land by Plantation Corporation of Kerala will come up before the Central Empowered Committee, New Delhi, on July 20

summary: Continuous action will be taken especially against encroachment in footpaths and non-vending zones, said GCC Commissioner G.S.Sameeran.

title: PMK organises signature campaign urging State govt. to notify extent of Pallikaranai marshland
summary: Speaking during the campaign, the PMK president criticised DMK minister P.K. Sekarbabu, who was in-charge of the CMDA, for not playing the crucial role of being the watchdog in the State for real estate development

title: India’s F&O boom needs adequate protections
summary: Retail traders lose because they are bringing knives to a gunfight. SEBI’s research reveals that 97% of institutional profits and 96% of proprietary trading profits in the Indian F&O market are generated by algorithmic trading.

title: Puducherry govt. notifies policy framework for engaging private players in infrastructure development
summary: The Public-Private Partnership policy framework allows any private firm or individual to propose a potential project in an industrial estate in Puducherry

title: Watch: Inside the Jantar Mantar protest: Why hundreds gathered in Delhi
summary: Thousands gathered at the Jantar Mantar in New Delhi on July 19 ahead of CJP’s planned march to Parliament, even as the Delhi Police issued a prohibitory order against marches.

title: Between power and principle: IUML’s dilemma in Kerala
summary: The IUML is torn between its political positions and compulsions of governance

title: Neha, a prominent face of the CJP protests, presses on with hunger strike
summary: The All India Students’ Association’s national president and two of her colleagues continue the hunger strike demanding reforms in education. She vows to continue the fight to remind people that ‘the divisive politics that the BJP has taught’ is not their legacy
